title: rubus × breviatus
intro: Rubus × breviatus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between Rubus occidentalis and Rubus allegheniensis, resulting in a plant with desirable traits from both parent species. The medicinal properties of Rubus × breviatus include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × breviatus include its potential to help manage conditions such as arthritis, high blood pressure, and certain types of cancer, as well as supporting heart health and immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus × breviatus can be made into jams, jellies, syrups, and teas, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
